languages.text: "Что привело вас в Сектор Бионика, Лорд-капитан? Одно слово — и мы исправим любую проблему!"

traits.locale_text: "Добро пожаловать в Сектум Бионика! Вам требуется медицинская процедура?"

languages.text: "What brings you to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain? Just say the word and we'll fix any problem!"
languages.original_text: "Что привело вас в Сектор Бионика, Лорд-капитан? Одно слово — и мы исправим любую проблему!"

traits.locale_text: "What brings you to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain? Just say the word and we'll fix any problem!"
"What brings you to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain? Just say the word and we'll fix any problem!"
"What brings you to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain? Just say the word and we'll fix any problem!"

languages.text: 「セクター・ビオニカに来たのは何のためですか、キャプテン卿？ 言ってください、どんな問題でも解決します！」
languages.original_text: "What brings you to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain? Just say the word and we'll fix any problem!"

traits.locale_text: 「セクター・ビオニカに来たのは何のためですか、キャプテン卿？ 言ってください、どんな問題でも解決します！」

languages.text: "Sizi Sektör Biyonika'ya getiren nedir Lord Kaptan? Söyleyin, sorunlarınızı çözelim!"
languages.original_text: "What brings you to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain? Just say the word and we'll fix any problem!"

traits.locale_text: "Sizi Sektör Biyonika'ya getiren nedir Lord Kaptan? Söyleyin, sorunlarınızı çözelim!"

languages.text: «¿Qué l{mf|e|a} trae al Sector Bionica, Lord Capitán? ¡Solo tiene que decirlo y solucionaremos cualquier problema!».
languages.original_text: "What brings you to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain? Just say the word and we'll fix any problem!"

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué l{mf|e|a} trae al Sector Bionica, Lord Capitán? ¡Solo tiene que decirlo y solucionaremos cualquier problema!».

languages.text: “什么风把您吹到了仿生区，舰长大人？只要您一句话，我们会解决您的一切问题！”
languages.original_text: "What brings you to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain? Just say the word and we'll fix any problem!"

traits.locale_text: “什么风把您吹到了仿生区，舰长大人？只要您一句话，我们会解决您的一切问题！”

languages.text: « Qu'est-ce qui vous amène dans le secteur Bionica, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ? Nous sommes à votre disposition en cas de problème, il suffit de demander ! »
languages.original_text: "What brings you to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain? Just say the word and we'll fix any problem!"

traits.locale_text: « Qu'est-ce qui vous amène dans le secteur Bionica, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ? Nous sommes à votre disposition en cas de problème, il suffit de demander ! »

languages.text: "Was führt Euch in den Sektor Bionika, Lord Captain? Ein Wort von Euch genügt, und wir lösen jedes Problem!"
languages.original_text: "What brings you to the Sector Bionica, Lord Captain? Just say the word and we'll fix any problem!"

traits.locale_text: "Was führt Euch in den Sektor Bionika, Lord Captain? Ein Wort von Euch genügt, und wir lösen jedes Problem!"
